content: Get Sentry integration playbook from integration_playbook_expert
Request Sentry DSN credentials from user
Install Jest and testing dependencies for backend
Create Jest configuration and test suite for backend
Create Playwright configuration and E2E test suite for frontend
Add test scripts to package.json for both frontend and backend
Install Sentry packages for backend and frontend
Create Sentry configuration files (awaiting DSN from user)
Integrate Sentry into frontend index.js with error boundary
Add SENTRY_DSN environment variables to .env files (template)
Verify services restart successfully with Sentry integration
Create comprehensive README for Sentry setup
Update plan.md to mark Phase 10.2 and 10.3 as completed
